---
title: People
---


## Staff

![John Doe, Ph.D.](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: MRI Physicist


![Nathan Muncy, Ph.D.](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: MRI Analyst


![John Doe](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: MRI Technologist


![Alex Musser](../media/people/minion.jpg){width=100, fig-align="left"}

**Position**: Operations Coordinator
